commands.name: adk
commands.description: Create, build, and deploy MapLarge Application Developer Kit (ADK) projects and extensions

commands.name: build
commands.description: Builds the client-side (TypeScript) of an ADK project.

options.name: -extensions
options.description: Comma-separated list of extension names to build.

options.name: -disableOptimizations
options.description: Disable compiler optimizations (e.g. incremental build, etc).

commands.name: config
commands.description: Display the configuration settings of the current ADK project

commands.name: create-extension
commands.description: Adds an ADK extension based on a template (optional)

options.name: -name
options.description: Name of the new ADK extension (alphanumeric, dashes and underscores allowed; no spaces)

options.name: -clone
options.description: URL to a remote git repository

options.name: -template
options.description: Name of the extension template from which to create the new extension

options.name: -targetFramework
options.description: Target .NET framework version for server-side templates

commands.name: create-project
commands.description: Creates a new ADK project

options.name: -name
options.description: Name of the new ADK project (alphanumeric, dashes and underscores allowed; no spaces)

commands.name: deploy
commands.description: Packages and deploys the specified extensions.

options.name: --extension
options.description: The name of the extension(s). Can be a comma-separated list.

options.name: -profile
options.description: Name of user profile for authentication and communication with a MapLarge server instance

options.name: --pre-release
options.description: Append a prerelease tag. Use 'GITBRANCH' to automatically use the current git branch name.

options.name: --increment-version
options.description: Automatically increment the extension version. Options: MAJOR, MINOR, PATCH, PRERELEASE

options.name: -user
options.description: User account used to authenticate with the server

options.name: -password
options.description: Password used to authenticate with the server

options.name: -install
options.description: Install the extension after successful upload

options.name: -timeout
options.description: Timeout period (in seconds) for HTTP requests to the server

options.name: -overwrite
options.description: Overwrite a previously built extension archive in the output path.

options.name: -seedVersion
options.description: Option a) provide a literal version number to set the version in the manifest.  Option b) provide the string SERVER_INSTALLED; the CLI will look up and set the manifest version to the installed version of the extension on the server; normally used in conjunction with -incrementVersion, which will then increment the retrieved version, ensuring the newly packaged extension is assigned the next incremental version.

options.name: -purgeOtherVersions
options.description: Delete each extension version that is the not the currently installed version

commands.name: exec-script
commands.description: Execute an automation script.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize an ADK project by downloading version info, plugin dependencies, and typescript declarations, and configuring compile settings

options.name: -remoteServer
options.description: MapLarge server instance to develop extensions for.  Include protocol and domain (e.g. https://maplarge.mydomain.com)

options.name: -localServerRoot
options.description: Path to the maplarge-api-server-git local repository

options.name: -profile
options.description: Name of user profile for authentication and communication with a MapLarge server instance

options.name: -configuration
options.description: Build configuration for building server-side extension projects

options.name: -targetFramework
options.description: Target framework for building server-side extension projects

options.name: -skipPackageUpdates
options.description: DEPRECATED - all packages are now pre-bundled with the CLI/ADK and do not require updating.  New versions of the CLI may bundle updated versions of auxiliary packages.

options.name: --DeclarationsOnly
options.description: Compile local server's entire set of TypeScript or declarations only (applies only when -localServerRoot.  Options: All,None,DeclarationsOnly

options.name: -skipDownloadTypeScriptDeclarations
options.description: Skip download of TypeScript declarations from remoteServer

options.name: -skipDownloadPluginDependencies
options.description: Skip download of PluginDependencies libraries from remoteServer

options.name: -timeout
options.description: Timeout period (in seconds) for HTTP requests to the server

options.name: -serverVersion
options.description: Server version number (SemVer) against which to initialize an ADK project

options.name: -pathToTypeScriptDeclarations
options.description: Local path to TypeScript declarations (file or folder)

options.name: -pathToPluginDependencies
options.description: Local path to plugin dependencies (file or folder)

options.name: --bypass-dependency-failures
options.description: Bypass error if any extension dependencies are missing or do not satisfy the range specified in the manifest.

commands.name: list-templates
commands.description: List all available extension templates

commands.name: new
commands.description: Create a new project, extension, or component.

commands.name: component
commands.description: Create a new component.

commands.name: extension
commands.description: Create a new extension.

commands.name: feature
commands.description: Add a feature to an extension.

commands.name: project
commands.description: Create a new project.

commands.name: package
commands.description: Packages the specified extensions.

options.name: --extension
options.description: The name of the extension(s). Can be a comma-separated list.

options.name: -profile
options.description: Name of user profile for authentication and communication with a MapLarge server instance

options.name: --pre-release
options.description: Append a prerelease tag. Use 'GITBRANCH' to automatically use the current git branch name.

options.name: --increment-version
options.description: Automatically increment the extension version. Options: MAJOR, MINOR, PATCH, PRERELEASE

options.name: -outputFolder
options.description: Folder in which to write the packaged extension ZIP(s)

options.name: -customPackageName
options.description: Custom name for the package ZIP file (e.g. -customPackageName "mypackage" => mypackage.zip).  Use special placeholders to inject metadata from the extension manifest: #NAME#, #VERSION#.  Example: -extensions myext -customPackageName "#NAME#__#VERSION#__hotfix" => myext__1.2.3__hotfix.zip

options.name: -overwrite
options.description: Overwrite a previously built extension archive in the output path.

options.name: -seedVersion
options.description: Option a) provide a literal version number to set the version in the manifest.  Option b) provide the string SERVER_INSTALLED; the CLI will look up and set the manifest version to the installed version of the extension on the server; normally used in conjunction with -incrementVersion, which will then increment the retrieved version, ensuring the newly packaged extension is assigned the next incremental version.

commands.name: run
commands.description: Builds the ADK project's client-side code and starts the ADK web server

options.name: -httpPort
options.description: Non-SSL port on which to host the ADK

options.name: -httpsPort
options.description: SSL port on which to host the ADK

options.name: -hostAddress
options.description: IP or host address for the local ADK server.  Default is "localhost".  "*" may be used for binding to any hostname or IP address.

options.name: -extensions
options.description: Comma-separated list of extension names to build.

commands.name: update-version
commands.description: Updates the support files in the .adk folder with the versions bundled with the currently installed CLI

options.name: -backup
options.description: Backup the current .adk folder before updating

options.name: --init
options.description: Initialize against a server after updating.

options.name: --profile
options.description: Initialize using a specific profile instead of the previously active profile. Requires the --init option to work.

commands.name: version
commands.description: Display the ADK version of the current project

commands.name: admin
commands.description: Administer MapLarge server instances

commands.name: account
commands.description: account sub commands.

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a new account.

options.name: -server
options.description: MapLarge server instance to manipulate cluster

options.name: -token
options.description: Token used to authenticate (alternative to password)

options.name: -profile
options.description: Name of user profile for authentication and communication with a MapLarge server instance

options.name: -inputFile
options.description: Local path to a text file containing a JSON format query with table schema

options.name: -input
options.description: Json string (remove all whitespace and json fields should be enclosed in ' (single quote))

options.name: -timeout
options.description: Timeout period (in seconds) for HTTP requests to the server

options.name: -mlServerFwd
options.description: The node within this MapLarge cluster that this request should ultimately be executed on.

commands.name: delete-extension
commands.description: Deprecated - delete an extension by name and version.

options.name: -version
options.description: Version of extension to delete. You may specify a literal version number, or use ALL_NOT_INSTALLED to automatically delete all versions of an extension except installed version.

options.name: -user
options.description: User account used to authenticate with the server

options.name: -password
options.description: Password used to authenticate with the server

options.name: -timeout
options.description: Timeout period (in seconds) for HTTP requests to the server

commands.name: disable-extension
commands.description: Deprecated - disable an extension by name.

options.name: -user
options.description: User account used to authenticate with the server

options.name: -password
options.description: Password used to authenticate with the server

options.name: -timeout
options.description: Timeout period (in seconds) for HTTP requests to the server

commands.name: download-extension
commands.description: Deprecated - Download a specific extension.

options.name: -remoteServer
options.description: MapLarge server instance to download extensions from

options.name: -user
options.description: User account used to authenticate with the server

options.name: -profile
options.description: Name of user profile for authentication and communication with a MapLarge server instance

options.name: -extensionName
options.description: Name of the extension to download

options.name: -extensionVersion
options.description: Version of the extension to download - Option a) provide a literal version number to download the extension. Option b) provide the string SERVER_INSTALLED; the CLI will look up and download the installed version. Option c) provide the string LATEST; the CLI will download the latest version from server weather it is installed or not.

options.name: -timeout
options.description: Timeout period (in seconds) for HTTP requests to the server

options.name: -token
options.description: Token used to authenticate (alternative to password)

commands.name: cluster
commands.description: Modify the configuration of the Clusters

commands.name: alter
commands.description: Alter a cluster node.

options.name: -server
options.description: MapLarge server instance to manipulate cluster

options.name: -timeout
options.description: Timeout period (in minutes) for HTTP requests to the server

options.name: -previous-address
options.description: The Current address of the cluster node you would like to alter

options.name: -new-address
options.description: [Optional] The New address of the cluster node, aka what you would like to rename it to

options.name: -seeks-cluster-membership
options.description: [Optional] True to set the node to seek membership, false otherwise

options.name: -is-load-balancer
options.description: [Optional] The load balancer address, if one exists.

options.name: -is-peaking-use-only
options.description: [Optional] True to set the node to be a peaking node, false otherwise

commands.name: join
commands.description: Remove a node from an existing cluster.

options.name: -server
options.description: MapLarge server instance to manipulate cluster

options.name: -profile
options.description: Name of user profile for authentication and communication with a MapLarge server instance

options.name: -address-to-add
options.description: One or more Addresses as a comma seperated string (aka http://localhost:8001,http://localhost:8002,...) of servers to add to the cluster

options.name: -load-balancer-address
options.description: The address of the load balancer; or hit enter to skip

options.name: -is-load-balancer
options.description: True to set the node to be a load balancer, false otherwise, default is false

options.name: -timeout
options.description: Timeout period (in minutes) for HTTP requests to the server

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Remove a node from an existing cluster.

options.name: -server
options.description: MapLarge server instance to manipulate cluster

options.name: -profile
options.description: Name of user profile for authentication and communication with a MapLarge server instance

options.name: -timeout
options.description: Timeout period (in minutes) for HTTP requests to the server

options.name: -address-to-remove
options.description: The Address of the server you would like to remove from the cluster

options.name: -force
options.description: False to allow the chagne to happen via a ProposeClusterChange, true to force the change. default is false

options.name: -skip-reset
options.description: Skip sending reset command to node after removal. Useful if your node has already been shut down.

commands.name: query
commands.description: The MapLarge CLI allows users to submit query requests to a MapLarge server instance.

commands.name: exec
commands.description: execute a query to server.

options.name: -server
options.description: MapLarge server instance to manipulate cluster

options.name: -token
options.description: Token used to authenticate (alternative to password)

options.name: -profile
options.description: Name of user profile for authentication and communication with a MapLarge server instance

options.name: -inputFile
options.description: Local path to a text file containing a JSON or SQL query

options.name: -outputFile
options.description: Local path to text file into which query output will be written

options.name: -outputTypes
options.description: Comma-separated list containing one or more of the following output types: "json", "table", "csv".

options.name: -input
options.description: Sql Query string for eg. "select * from account.tablename" OR json string (remove all whitespace and json fields should be enclosed in ' (single quote))

options.name: -lang
options.description: Language of the query text ("json" or "sql")

options.name: -timeout
options.description: Timeout period (in seconds) for HTTP requests to the server

options.name: -mlServerFwd
options.description: The node within this MapLarge cluster that this request should ultimately be executed on.

commands.description: Special command to watch a file/directory and execute a command.

options.name: -path
options.description: File system path or directory path.

options.name: -include-subdirectories
options.description: Option to enable watch for subdirectory.

options.description: Comma-separated list of event types (e.g. Changed, Created, Deleted, Renamed).

options.description: Timeout period (in seconds) for HTTP requests to the server

options.name: -halt-after
options.description: Maximum number or executions before automatically closing the watch operation.
